title: GlowUp
description: Makes dropped ground items glow, with lots of customization
body:
### What even is this?
I'm glad you asked. GlowUp is a client-sided mod that applies the glowing effect to specific, configurable items on the ground.

### How can I configure what items glow?
The easiest way is to install [ModMenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu/) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config), then go to ModMenu's mod list and configure the settings from there. You can also edit the config by hand, under .minecraft/config/glowup.toml, but this is not recommended.

### Does this mod work with other mods?
It's compatible with most if not all mods that add their own items.

### Can it highlight other entities?
No, GlowUp only highlights dropped items.

### Found a bug or want to suggest a feature?
Please head over to the [Github](https://github.com/Spyxar/GlowUp/issues) and make an issue.
